title: Add BigramHash: hashed bigram embeddings with optional dim projection
author: CrimsonSithria

data.description: Adds hashed bigram embeddings for (prev_token, cur_token) pairs and adds them to token representations before the first transformer block.

novel_contributions: Hashed bigram embeddings added to the model input representations
Optional projection from bigram embedding dimension to model dimension to reduce artifact size
Separate optimizer group for bigram parameters at token embedding learning rate
